case_title: AIR TRAVEL CENTER VS FLORES DOROTHY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AIR TRAVEL CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES DOROTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AIR TRAVEL CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES DOROTHY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT FLORES DOROTHY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22628, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AIR TRAVEL CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLORES DOROTHY REMANDED FROM SUP. CT. SCA 22628 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
